title: After the Japanese Derby: The Ines Chant

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following her heart and holding nothing back,
Ines Fujin puts on a brilliant performance at the
Japanese Derby and claims the title of Derby
champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she can barely walk after her fierce
performance, she musters the energy to head
over to the stands and respond to her supporters'
cheers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They chant her name over and over in celebration
of her victory. Summoning the last of her
strength, Ines Fujin thanks the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And finally, after her winning concert... she
collapses.
